paper_title: A Quantitative Approach to Tactical Asset Allocation

strategies.strategy_name: Global Tactical Asset Allocation (GTAA) with 10-Month Moving Average Timing
strategies.description: A time-series trend-following strategy that uses a simple 10-month moving average crossover rule to tactically allocate between risky assets and cash. For each of five asset classes, the strategy goes long when the month-end price exceeds its 10-month simple moving average, and moves to cash (T-bills) otherwise. The portfolio is equally weighted across assets, with each asset managed independently.
strategies.data_source: Global Financial Data (GFD), Morningstar/Dimson Marsh Staunton, Cowles Commission/S&P
universe_assets: US 10-Year Government Bond Total Return Index
Goldman Sachs Commodity Index (GSCI) Total Return
strategies.universe_selection_criteria: Five specified total return indices representing major asset classes; no additional filters applied.

indicators.name: 10-Month Simple Moving Average
indicators.formula: Calculate the simple moving average of monthly closing prices over the most recent 10 months (including current month). For month t, SMA(t) = (P(t) + P(t-1) + ... + P(t-9)) / 10, where P(t) is the monthly closing price at the end of month t.

indicators.name: Price vs. SMA Crossover Signal
indicators.formula: Compare the current month's closing price to the 10-month SMA. Generate a binary trading signal: 1 (long) if price > SMA, 0 (cash) if price ≤ SMA. No percentage band filter is applied.

logic_pipeline.description: Calculate 10-month simple moving average for each asset
logic_pipeline.expression: SMA_10(t) = (P(t) + P(t-1) + ... + P(t-9)) / 10, where P is monthly closing price

logic_pipeline.description: Generate crossover signal by comparing current price to 10-month SMA
logic_pipeline.expression: IF price_monthly_close(t) > sma_10_month(t) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE

logic_pipeline.description: Convert boolean signal to asset allocation decision for each asset class
logic_pipeline.expression: IF price_sma_crossover_signal(t) = TRUE THEN allocate 20% to asset_class_i ELSE allocate 20% to cash (90-day T-bills)

logic_pipeline.description: Aggregate independent asset class signals into final portfolio allocation
logic_pipeline.expression: Portfolio(t) = Σ(asset_allocation_signal_i(t) for i=1 to 5), where each asset_class_i contributes either 20% to its risky asset or 20% to cash based on its individual signal

execution_plan.description: Monthly rebalancing of GTAA portfolio based on 10-month SMA crossover signals for each asset class

action.logic: WHEN price_sma_crossover_signal=True: LONG asset; WHEN price_sma_crossover_signal=False: EXIT asset to cash

risk_management: Position limit per asset: 20% of portfolio (equal weight allocation)
Maximum risky asset exposure: 100% (when all 5 assets are above SMA)
Minimum risky asset exposure: 0% (when all 5 assets are below SMA)
Cash position when asset signal is negative: 90-day Treasury bills
